label: Submission ID
example_or_options: auto-generated UUID or form response ID
notes: Should be generated by the form or workflow if the form tool cannot do it natively.

label: Submitted At
notes: Should be captured automatically by the form platform or webhook layer.

label: Full Name
notes: Use one full-name field to keep the form simple.

label: Email
notes: Primary contact field and part of the dedup key.

label: Property Type
example_or_options: 3-bedroom home; condo; townhome; single-family home; investment property; luxury property
notes: Keep choices aligned with your market.

label: Timeline
example_or_options: ASAP; within 30 days; within 60 days; within 90 days; 3-6 months; 6+ months
notes: Used in scoring and follow-up urgency.

label: How can we help?
example_or_options: We are relocating next month and want to schedule viewings this week.

label: Source Channel
notes: Required because it is part of the dedup key.
